raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally raise a complaint regarding services received during my XXXX XXXX XXXX, Carnival XXXX vacation. 
During the cruise, I consulted with the XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX  regarding facial filler treatments, a service I previously underwent on a Carnival XXXX  in XXXX. Following his recommendation, I opted for the XXXX treatment instead. The doctor assured me that XXXX would provide immediate results, ongoing improvement over time, and last for 35 years, making it a better long-term value despite its higher cost ( {$3200.00} ). Based on his professional guidance, I trusted these representations and proceeded with the treatment. The doctor also encouraged me to apply for the Carnival Mastercard to facilitate the payment interest-free. 
Unfortunately, the promised results were not achieved ( no results were achieved ). I relied on the doctors expertise, but the outcome fell drastically short of the representations made, leaving me feeling misled. When I contacted Carnival about this issue, I was directed to XXXX XXXX XXXX, the third-party provider managing spa services. Carnival stated they bear no responsibility for XXXX XXXX XXXX services. However, I paid Carnival for those services as evidenced on the Carnival Mastercard statement. 
Attempts to resolve the matter with XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX have been equally unsatisfactory. Despite acknowledging receipt of my initial complaint via email, they have failed to respond to multiple follow-ups. On XX/XX/XXXX, I managed to reach a representative by phone, but after explaining the nature of my complaint, the call was disconnected. Further attempts to contact them have been unsuccessful. 
I contacted Barclays, the issuer of Carnivals Mastercard, to dispute the charge. Despite providing all relevant documentation, they declined to investigate the matter thoroughly. I reached out to them by phone on several occasions but was not allowed to speak directly with anyone regarding the dispute. Instead, I was instructed to submit my dispute exclusively via fax or mail. After following their process and escalating the matter by asking them to reopen the dispute and review my additional information ( submitted via fax ), I received a letter stating they had reviewed my case but declined to provide further assistance. They referred me back to Carnival for any credit. 
I trusted Carnival and its representatives to provide high-quality services and accurate guidance, but this experience was deeply disappointing. I kindly request your assistance in resolving this matter promptly and fairly.
